# TREE SERVICE

> Licensed & insured tree removal, pruning, palm cleaning and emergency storm cleanup in Sacramento, CA. Free same-day estimates. Call 916-890-8080.

TREE SERVICE is a Sacramento-based arborist and tree service company. The site presents services, portfolio of completed jobs, information about the founder, and contact options (phone and Telegram bot).

## Pages
- [Home (English)](/): Services overview, portfolio, about the founder, contact form.
- [Главная (Russian)](/ru): Russian-language version of the site.

## Optional
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
